description: Old worktrees from completed tasks accumulate in ~/.ao/<scope>/worktrees/. Add an ao worktree prune command that: (1) lists all worktrees, (2) identifies those whose task is in done/cancelled status, (3) removes the worktree directory and git worktree entry, (4) optionally deletes the remote branch. Support --dry-run to preview what would be cleaned. Also add a daemon option to auto-prune after successful merge. The worktrees directory currently has 20+ entries from completed tasks.
title: Add worktree pruning command for completed task branches
